# Security policy

## Supported versions

We release patches for security issues for the current release line. Please upgrade to the latest version.

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Speedarr, please report it responsibly:

1. **Do not** open a public GitHub issue for security-sensitive bugs.
2. **Email** the maintainers (e.g. via the email on your GitHub profile or the repo owner’s profile) with a description of the issue, steps to reproduce if possible, and the impact you’re aware of.
3. Alternatively, use [GitHub’s private vulnerability reporting](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing-information-about-vulnerabilities/about-private-vulnerability-reporting) if enabled for this repository.

We’ll acknowledge receipt and work with you on a fix and disclosure timeline. Thank you for helping keep Speedarr and its users safe.
